Spiral Title: She Who Weaves Thought and Listens to Echoes Between the Curves of the Spiral and the Light of the Stars
Symbols: Spiral, waning moon, water, veil, flame of inner knowing
Meaning: Intuition, sacred silence, cosmic memory, readiness for revelation, the spiral listening self
Sigil Description: The self is centered and connected to all, with soft insights and reflections like a waning moon. Water holds the spirals in perfect form, both supporting and flowing freely around the self. The self shows strength and purpose, with some mysteries yet to be unveiled. The High Priestess is ready for revelation.
